name: 3D Globe
summary: An interactive 3D globe visualization component powered by Cobe library that renders a rotating Earth with customizable markers, connections, and visual styling for global data presentation.
detailedDescription: The 3D Globe component brings geographical data to life through an interactive, rotating three-dimensional Earth visualization. Built on top of the Cobe rendering library, this component creates a visually stunning representation of global connections, user distributions, or international presence. The globe features smooth auto-rotation with user-controlled interaction, allowing visitors to spin and explore different regions. Customizable markers can be placed at specific latitude and longitude coordinates to represent offices, users, data centers, or any geographically-distributed information. Animated connection lines can be drawn between points to visualize routes, relationships, or data flow across continents. The component uses WebGL rendering for optimal performance, ensuring smooth 60fps animation even with multiple markers and connections. Visual customization includes globe color, marker styles, line colors, rotation speed, and size controls. Perfect for SaaS companies showing global reach, logistics platforms displaying routes, or any application requiring geographical context. The component is responsive and scales appropriately across different screen sizes while maintaining visual fidelity and interaction quality.
purpose: Visualize global data, user distributions, or international presence in an engaging 3D format
Display geographical connections, routes, or networks between different locations
Create impressive hero sections for companies with global operations or reach
Provide interactive geographical context for location-based data and analytics
Enhance credibility and visual appeal with professional globe visualization
behavior: Automatically rotates on Y-axis with configurable speed for continuous motion
Responds to mouse drag and touch gestures for manual globe rotation
Renders markers at specified latitude/longitude coordinates on globe surface
Draws animated connection lines between marker points when configured
Adjusts marker sizes and line widths based on data values or importance
Maintains smooth 60fps WebGL rendering with optimized draw calls
Scales responsively to container size while preserving aspect ratio
visualCharacteristics: Three-dimensional spherical Earth representation with depth perception
Smooth continuous rotation creating dynamic, living visualization
Customizable color schemes matching brand identity or data categories
Clean, modern aesthetic with minimal visual clutter
Professional and impressive appearance suitable for enterprise contexts
Interactive elements that respond to user exploration and manipulation
recommendations: Use where moderate motion and reusable composition improve UX and clarity.
